price: Das ist tatsächlich wahr: (so ist) der Streit der Bewohner des (Höllen)feuers miteinander.
arabic: إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَحَقّٞ تَخَاصُمُ أَهۡلِ ٱلنَّارِ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: inna dhālika laḥaqqun takhāṣumu ahli al-nāri
